title: استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي لحماية الأطفال عبر الإنترنت
text_original: a children and young people by supporting their right to mode to further civic participation. Refer to the general guidelines in Table 1. Using technology AI-driven systems should be developed to support children’s advances to protect development and well-being as an outcome in all system design, and educate children development and implementation. The best available and widely accepted development and well-being metrics should be their reference point. Companies should invest in research and development of ethical AI- based tools to detect acts of online CSAE, and online harassment and bullying, in collaboration with key experts on children’s rights and children themselves. Advances in AI technology should be applied to target age- appropriate messaging for children without compromising their identity, location and personal details. text_simplified: يجب دعم حقوق الأطفال والشباب في المشاركة المدنية باستخدام التكنولوجيا. ينبغي تطوير أنظمة ذكاء اصطناعي أخلاقية لحماية الأطفال من التحرش والتنمر عبر الإنترنت، مع احترام خصوصية بياناتهم. كما يجب توجيه الرسائل الإلكترونية بما يتناسب مع أعمارهم دون كشف هوياتهم.
